ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the state */,
  "active_election" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is an active election in the state */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "active_election" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is an active election in the county */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "precinct_code" TEXT /* Code for the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "active_election" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is an active election in the precinct */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of the office (e.g., US House, US Senate) */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office in years */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Candidate's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Candidate's gender */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Candidate's occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "recorded_votes" INTEGER /* Number of recorded votes for the candidate */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout in the precinct */,
  "percent_reporting" REAL /* Percentage of precincts reporting results */,
  "timestamp_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "total_voted" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "voting_method_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of votes by voting method (e.g., JSON string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the voting method is currently active */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballot_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot count entry */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting method */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast using the method */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted using the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballot_counts_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballot_counts_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registered_voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registered voter entry */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registered_voters_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Level of access (e.g., 1 for public, 2 for analyst, 3 for election official) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
